GUARD_ONE_EVENT.title: Guard's Trial
GUARD_ONE_EVENT.pages.INITIAL.descriptio: By the campfire, you encounter a mysterious guard. He offers two trials:
GUARD_ONE_EVENT.pages.INITIAL.options.PO: Gain 13 max HP, upgrade a card, but the Boss will be replaced by a Guard
GUARD_ONE_EVENT.pages.OPTION_POWER.descr: You accepted the Power Trial. Max HP increased, card upgraded. But the Boss ahead has been replaced...
GUARD_ONE_EVENT.pages.OPTION_HEAL.descri: You accepted the Healing Trial. HP restored, card upgraded.
